title: Sinners in Paradise
writer: Lester Cole, Harold Buckley, Louis Stevens
actors: Madge Evans, John Boles, Bruce Cabot
plot: A seaplane departs for China. On board are a nurse escaping a loveless marriage to do work with refugees, a woman hoping to surprise her estranged son, a wealthy heiress trying to distance herself from labor troubles, an oily poli...
